description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image, caches the apt/, cargo/, and target/ directories, and defines the variables APT_CACHE_DIR and CARGO_HOME pointing to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/apt and $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo respectively. Define two stages: test and build, and include a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yq for all jobs. In the test stage add a test job that runs rustc --version, then cargo --version, then cargo test --verbose, and assign it to the test stage. No additional rules, only/except conditions, or deployment targets are required.
